summary: Offers/Coupons CRUD feature testing complete - All backend tests passed (9/9). All frontend tests passed. New feature: Admin panel Offers tab (8th tab with pricetag icon) allows creating, viewing, and deleting offers. Offers display on main page in 'Posebne ponude' section with discount badges. Admin panel now has 8 tabs (was 7 in iteration 15).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: POST /api/business/offers creates offer (requires admin/business auth)
✓ Backend: GET /api/offers?active_only=false returns all offers (public endpoint)
✓ Backend: GET /api/offers?active_only=true returns only active offers
✓ Backend: All endpoints return 401 without authentication
✓ Backend: Offers enriched with location_name and location_image
✓ Backend: discount_percent and expires_at are optional fields
✓ Frontend: Admin panel has 8 tabs (locations, categories, businesses, tourism, events, offers, notifications, settings)
✓ Frontend: Offers tab (pricetag icon - 6th tab) shows offers list with count
✓ Frontend: Modal has all required fields (location selector, title, description, discount %, expiry date)
✓ Frontend: Location selector is horizontal scroll of all locations
✓ Frontend: Delete button (trash icon) removes offer from list
✓ Frontend: Main page shows 'Posebne ponude' section with offer cards
✓ Frontend: Offer cards display discount badge, title, description, location name
✓ Regression: All previous features working (map, search, categories, events, tourism, leaderboard)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_offers_crud.py - Created comprehensive test suite for admin offers CRUD (9 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test offers already exist in database from previous testing. No new seed data created during this test iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New admin offers management feature fully functional. Admin panel now has 8 tabs including Offers tab (pricetag icon - 6th tab). Offers management allows creating and deleting offers with location selector (horizontal scroll), title, description, discount percentage, and expiry date. Backend endpoints require admin or business authentication. Main page 'Posebne ponude' section displays active offers with discount badges, titles, descriptions, and location names. All previous features verified working.

admin_offers_crud.test_create_offer_and_verify_persistence: ✓ POST creates offer, GET /api/offers shows it with correct data
admin_offers_crud.test_delete_offer_removes_from_list: ✓ DELETE removes offer, GET /api/offers confirms deletion
admin_offers_crud.test_get_offers_active_only_filter: ✓ GET /api/offers?active_only=true returns only active offers, active_only=false returns all
admin_offers_crud.test_offer_structure_validation: ✓ Offer response has all required fields (id, location_id, title, description, is_active, created_at, discount_percent, expires_at)

offers_public_endpoint.test_offers_enriched_with_location_data: ✓ Offers enriched with location_name and location_image fields
